parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: ($env.N8N_ANTHROPIC_MODEL_PRIMARY || 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'), max_tokens: 300, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are an Executive Assistant triaging emails for Antonio Fortes. Classify this email. Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: is_important (boolean), is_bill (boolean), category (string: one of Important/Bill/Legal/Personal/Newsletter/Spam), reason (string), summary (string), suggested_action (string). An email is important if it is from a real person or organization requiring action, is legal/official correspondence, is a bill/payment, or is from a known VIP. Newsletters, marketing, promotions, and automated notifications are NOT important.

Force important: ' + $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['force_important'] + '
Rule reason: ' + ($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['rule_reason'] || 'none') + '

From: ' + $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['sender_email'] + '
Domain: ' + $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['sender_domain'] + '
Subject: ' + $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['subject_normalized'] + '
Body: ' + $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['body_normalized'].substring(0, 1500) }] }) }}

boolean.value1: ={{ (() => { try { const raw = $node['AI Triage (Claude)'].json.content?.[0]?.text || ''; const cleaned = raw.replace(/```json\n?/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); const p = JSON.parse(cleaned); const category = String(p.category || '').trim().toLowerCase(); return $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['force_spam'] || $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['force_important'] || p.is_important === true || category === 'newsletter' || category === 'spam'; } catch(e) { return $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['force_spam'] || $node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['force_important'] || false; } })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const raw = ($node['AI Triage (Claude)'].json.content?.[0]?.text || '{}'); const cleaned = raw.replace(/```json\n?/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); let ai = {}; try { ai = JSON.parse(cleaned); } catch (e) {} const rawCategory = String(ai.category || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const queue = ($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['force_spam'] || rawCategory === 'spam') ? 'Spam Review' : (rawCategory === 'newsletter' ? 'Newsletter Review' : 'Action'); const categoryMap = { important: 'Important', bill: 'Bill', legal: 'Legal', personal: 'Personal', newsletter: 'Newsletter', spam: 'Spam' }; const normalizedCategory = categoryMap[rawCategory] || (queue === 'Spam Review' ? 'Spam' : (queue === 'Newsletter Review' ? 'Newsletter' : 'Important')); const status = queue === 'Action' ? 'Not Started' : 'Completed'; return JSON.stringify({ parent: { data_source_id: ($env['NOTION_DATA_SOURCE_ID'] || '2c91d511-87a6-805c-ab38-000b18d92545') }, properties: { Name: { title: [{ text: { content: ((($node['Gmail Get All'].json['subject'] || $node['Gmail Get All'].json['Subject'] || 'No Subject') + ' [INVESTOR]').substring(0, 100)) } }] }, Sender: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (($node['Gmail Get All'].json['From'] || $node['Gmail Get All'].json['from'] || $node['Gmail Get All'].json['sender'] || $node['Gmail Get All'].json['email'] || '').substring(0, 100)) } }] }, 'Sender Domain': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['sender_domain'] || '').substring(0, 100)) } }] }, 'Core Request': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((ai.summary || 'AI triage failed').substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, 'Importance Reason': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['rule_reason'] || ai.reason || '')).substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, Category: { select: { name: normalizedCategory } }, Queue: { select: { name: queue } }, 'Provider Action': { select: { name: 'None' } }, 'Provider Action Status': { select: { name: (queue === 'Action' ? 'Skipped' : 'Pending') } }, 'Reply Draft': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((ai.suggested_action || '').substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, Status: { select: { name: status } }, 'Original Link': { url: $node['Gmail Get All'].json['webViewLink'] || $node['Gmail Get All'].json['webLink'] || ('https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox/' + ($node['Gmail Get All'].json['id'] || '')) } } }); })() }}
